author: BiCuriousGeorge#8804
install_msg: ChodeCoin has been installed! Use `[p]chodecoin` to get started.
name: chodecoin
short: Karma-style coin system with ++ and -- tracking
description: A coin economy cog. Users can give or remove ChodeCoin with @user++ or @user--, gift coins, check balances, view leaderboards, and track statistics. Future store integration planned.
